title: No Terralith Fortified Villages
body:
# No Terralith Fortified Villages

Simple datapack that stops the fortified villages from [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith), including their desert variant, from generating.

If you're using the datapack version of Terralith, this pack must load **after** (i.e. above) Terralith for it to work.

Using this pack with the mod version of Terralith seems to work as well (tested on 1.21.1), however, I cannot make any guarantees that it will work in all scenarios.

To test whether this pack is working correctly, run the following commands: `/locate structure terralith:fortified_village` and `/locate structure terralith:fortified_desert_village`. Both should show that the structure could not be found.
